{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231907102680F3804A723FFB9522"}"},"total":562},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7404980979644842776","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还有，在写那个红月酒店的时候，为什么要和日本人组队？！！虽然题材新颖，但那个姜程程 ——（有一点无语。）不好意思，语言有些过激。本书确实是一本非常好的书，以上所有的缺点都在我个人的立场上。如有冒犯到其他读者，敬请谅解，谢谢！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724112059,"group_id":"7390729860668197913","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2881166325851607"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7390729860668197913","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"23"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5674,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6188,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7404829675767825176","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错，还可以。主角的能力与外挂也很好，在恐怖的环境中，主角的对比也写得很不错。不过，对于我这种读者，文中的主角可不可以不要和其他角色关系太亲密了呢？"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1724074682,"group_id":"7390729860668197913","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9dTI7ZMwP9ULzXizgAL+7tOWsT7E0+8vYrVoNB5XJGf","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f05ee63c1abc49fa9b34c86f0a262002~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790192&x-signature=mYk%2BXPyh9cLStxcJOEsGx9daiBM%3D","user_id":"2881166325851607","user_name":"这个装憨"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2881166325851607","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7390729860668197913","book_info":{"abstract":"林枫被困规则怪谈世界五年，出来后本以为能够过上平静生活，却不曾想成为龙国天选者，代替龙国参加规则怪谈。
等林枫进去之后，发现竟然都是熟诡异，熟悉的不可言说。
妈妈的纸条里面的假妈妈，长得十分漂亮，韵味十足，明明想要杀死天选者却对林枫照顾有加。
红月酒店里的萧经理，其人貌美如花，冰冷的像一座冰山，一言不合就吃天选者，却与林枫关系暧昧不清。
要命精神病院的不可言说，许多天选者的噩梦，在楚风面前确是一个乖乖的小女孩追着林枫喊哥哥。
在林枫面前十分温馨的规则怪谈副本到了别人那里，却成了一个个催命符。
众人，“这林枫到底是怎么回事，明明是规则怪谈为什么我们感觉他更像是回到了家。”
别国天选者，“这林枫该不会跟规则怪谈世界有什么见不得人的勾当吧？”
本书又名，让你参加规则怪谈没让你回家，规则怪谈我与诡异们不得不说的事儿，规则怪谈我是最强关系户","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/25c24cf17c16e2d3fd6872110eead484","author":"比比北","author_id":"","book_id":"7390729860668197913","book_name":"不是哥们，怪谈里全是你熟人？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7390729909632516633","read_count":"21469","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1405933"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.9","serial_count":"680","tags":"悬疑脑洞,系统,穿越,直播,灵异,规则怪谈,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/714ffe8e84ea2af8415e3274504a5887~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779448030&x-signature=%2F%2BgUGAsFzI87z6MaPfiYmbH8jdU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2049913856212256","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"23"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231907102680F3804A723FFB9522"}"}
